posts.content: I used to believe this and then I saw the budget requested for a traditional chemistry grant.

I voluntarily read plenty of LLM output, but there should be consent. My default assumption when I read text is it reflects a human's thoughts, and it gives me the ick to realize half a line in that it doesn't.

interestSummary: Naomi Saphra's recent focus is on presenting and discussing her research on understanding and improving NLP model training, particularly the emergence of structures and mechanistic behaviors. She is also actively engaging with the academic community at ICML 2024 and commenting on peer review practices and the ethics of AI-generated text.
